CVE-2014-9638.title: oggenc in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to cause a d ...
CVE-2014-9638.description: oggenc in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (divide-by-zero error and crash) via a WAV file with the number of channels set to zero.

CVE-2014-9639.title: Integer overflow in oggenc in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote at ...
CVE-2014-9639.description: Integer overflow in oggenc in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a crafted number of channels in a WAV file, which triggers an out-of-bounds memory access.

CVE-2014-9640.title: oggenc/oggenc.c in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to  ...
CVE-2014-9640.description: oggenc/oggenc.c in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds read) via a crafted raw file.

CVE-2015-6749.title: Buffer overflow in the aiff_open function in oggenc/audio.c in vo ...
CVE-2015-6749.description: Buffer overflow in the aiff_open function in oggenc/audio.c in vorbis-tools 1.4.0 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) via a crafted AIFF file.

CVE-2017-11331.title: The wav_open function in oggenc/audio.c in Xiph.Org vorbis-tools  ...
CVE-2017-11331.description: The wav_open function in oggenc/audio.c in Xiph.Org vorbis-tools 1.4.0 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (memory allocation error) via a crafted wav file.
